interactive_prompts.name: trust_prompt
interactive_prompts.regex: Do you trust the contents of this directory|Trust this directory|Working with untrusted contents|This folder has not been trusted|Yes, continue
interactive_prompts.note: codex 0.134+ asks to trust dir on first launch; '1' = yes/trust. Regex broadened per cycle-121 research dossier (codex-cli-0.134-repl-boot-timeout-2026-05-28.md) to also catch the 'Working with untrusted contents' / 'Yes, continue' phrasings emitted on worktree paths not pre-trusted in ~/.codex/config.toml.

interactive_prompts.name: auth_recheck
interactive_prompts.regex: Please log in|sign in to ChatGPT|Authentication required

note: Interactive codex via tmux. Preserves ChatGPT-account subscription billing (vs codex exec, which may meter differently). Same tier_aliases as the codex-headless driver.
